message:
feat(ftui-text): add formal paragraph objective for Knuth-Plass line breaking (bd-2vr05.15.2.1)

Add TeX-standard paragraph objective types: FitnessClass enum (Tight/Normal/Loose/VeryLoose),
BreakKind/BreakPenalty for typed break classification, and ParagraphObjective struct with
badness(), demerits(), adjacency_demerits(), widow_demerits(), orphan_demerits() methods.
Includes terminal() and typographic() presets with 24 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
